behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names both files (keyboard.ts, SKILL.md), the tool name browser_press_key, the Enter key behavior, waitForCompletion, and the Core workflow section.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the desired behavior (wait for navigation, include snapshot) without dictating specific code changes or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check call ordering/presence via mocked tab/response (waitForCompletion, setIncludeSnapshot, keyboard.press), not specific variable names or line positions; alternative correct implementations would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute the handle function via Node subprocess with mocks and inspect runtime calls, plus run npm build/eslint.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub can't satisfy both branches: Enter must call waitForCompletion+setIncludeSnapshot, while Tab must NOT call waitForCompletion but must call keyboard.press:Tab.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover Enter waiting, auto-snapshot, non-Enter direct press, SKILL.md workflow update, and pressSequentially regression.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under clearly commented sections (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass regression, CI/CD).

structured_data_schema.reason: Task doesn't produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and commands match consistently across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Files to Look At is appropriate scoping; no specific line numbers or exact code changes leaked.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: SKILL.md diff is a small localized edit to the Core workflow numbered list.
